calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court required a hearing in this matter, for defendant to bring evidence showing that the $6,000 deposit on August 5, 2014 is payment for contract work performed by her husband and that her husband's funds are subject to bankruptcy protection. There being no appearance, DEFENDANT/CLAIMANT ANGIE MARSHALL's Claim of Exemption is denied. (The Court shall prepare the order and serve on all parties.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
